Attacks.Name: Icicle Spear
Attacks.Effect: After this attack is resolved, this character gains power equal to the damage dealt. If a wild is rolled, Cloyster may make an additional Icicle Spear attack against the same target without paying the power cost.

Attacks.Name: Clamp
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, the target character gains the Rooted special condition until the end of their next activation and suffers 1 damage at the start of their next activation.

Attacks.Name: Aurora Beam
Attacks.Effect: If a wild is rolled during this attack, reduce the target character's attack Strength by 1 until the end of their next activation.

Attacks.Name: Spike Cannon
Attacks.Effect: Roll attack dice three times. Each success deals 1 damage to the target. If a wild is rolled on any roll, the target gains the Bleed special condition.

Superpowers.Name: Shell Armor
Superpowers.Effect: Critical hits against this character are treated as normal hits. Additionally, reduce damage from attacks against this character by 1, to a minimum of 1.

Superpowers.Name: Skill Link
Superpowers.Effect: When this character uses Spike Cannon or Icicle Spear, add 1 die to the attack roll.

Superpowers.Name: Withdraw
Superpowers.Effect: Add 3 dice to Cloyster's defense rolls until the start of its next activation.

Attacks.Name: Blizzard
Attacks.Effect: This attack deals damage to all characters (friend and foe) within range 2 of the target character. If a wild is rolled, affected characters also gain the Slow special condition.

Superpowers.Name: Spiky Shield
Superpowers.Effect: Until the start of Cloyster's next activation, when an enemy character hits Cloyster with a melee attack, that character suffers 1 damage.
